first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across all sections is substantively the same. The minor differences in wording and the slightly more specific articulation of a concern in the variant evaluation fall within the expected range of run-to-run noise and are not plausibly linked to the change in location from Berlin to Bangalore.
